description: This file contains a basic Flutter application with a simple UI, including a main app widget and a stateful home page with a progress indicator.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: Main application widget that sets up the theme and home page.

classes.name: MyHomePage
classes.description: Stateful widget representing the home screen with a title.

classes.name: _MyHomePageState
classes.description: State class for MyHomePage, builds the UI with an app bar and a centered message with a progress indicator.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Entry point of the application, runs the MyApp widget.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the widget tree for MyApp and MyHomePage.
